pkgmetadata.longdescription: A port of the Perl, and JavaScript versions of JSONPathsee httpgoessner.netarticlesJsonPathBased on on JavaScript version by Stefan Goessner at httpsgoessner.netarticlesJsonPath httpcode.google.compjsonpathand Perl version by Kate Rhodes at httpgithub.commasukomijsonpath-perltreemasterPython3 compatibily by Per J. Sandstrom
